name: radia-mcp
summary: MCP servers for the Radia CAE ecosystem. 0.23.0 absorbs YouTube tutorial transcripts (cubit/build123d/gmsh sub-sources via youtube-transcript-api), Coreform training .zip into cubit_local, and PAT-gated GitHub-wide .jou code search. 0.22.x base: mcp-server-radia-interop universal CAD-MCP mesh backend; first-and-only public MCP for Gmsh + Cubit.
author: Kengo Sugahara
